headline: Is Waters Corporation (WAT) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is WAT a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Waters Corporation on The Wealth Dynasty Report’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on WAT. Waters Corporation’s share was trading at $301.88 as of May 4th. WAT’s trailing and forward P/E were 28.54 and 21.37 respectively according to Yahoo […]
